text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's my day off, so I decide to go watch an
off-campus marathon for inspiration...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Dash!

text_block_list.name: Marathon Director
text_block_list.text: And the winner iiiis... NICE NATURE!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Phew! I finished off strong!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, uh, thanks... You came to watch, huh?
choice_data_list: Yep. So I guess you felt like racing?
Yep. So I guess you felt like racing?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah. Do you remember what Palmer told
me before?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to try that whole "escape the ordinary"
thing she suggested.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Look around... Not all these participants are from
the academy. I figured that racing against new
faces might feel kind of refreshing...

text_block_list.name: Black-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Dang it! I lost!

text_block_list.name: Black-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
But that was so incredible, Nature! I hope I can
beat you someday!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Long-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, I know how you feel, but I'm not so sure
we stand a chance!

text_block_list.name: Long-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Your specialty's short races, right? Why don't you
just stick to those?

text_block_list.name: Black-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: No way! I won't give up! I can't give up! I've got this feeling inside me that I can't ignore...

text_block_list.name: Black-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I will win someday! My heart, my body, and my soul are all crying out for victory!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Her heart... is crying out?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Everything was perfect! I had the win in the bag!
But that darn Teio just had to...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Dang it, dang it, dang it! I can't believe this!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Huh. I guess I felt the same way.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's because she hasn't given up that she's frustrated and
eager to win.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I get it now... That's why when I lost to Teio, I felt so...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?! N-nothing! Anyway!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Siiigh... My face's burning up here... Guess I didn't realize I was this stubborn...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Um, hey. Can I ask you something?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I don't suppose you know any tricks people can
try to, you know, cool their heads?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Out of the blue, she asks me for advice. And what
comes to mind in the moment is...
choice_data_list: Going for a run might clear your mind.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so you think I should get some sugar to calm
down? Nice idea!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'm gonna go all in! Who cares about a
little heartburn?! Rub-a-dub-dub, bring on the
grub!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Pardon me, ma'am, I'd like a chocolate carrot.
Oh, and a fanfare soda, please!

text_block_list.name: Candy Store Owner
text_block_list.text:
Here ya are, Natie! Your sweet tooth's really
acting up today, huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's just been one of those days! So, any other
recommendations?

text_block_list.name: Black-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Nature! Sweet stuff always hits the spot after
a hard day of work, huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Whoa! You're those racers from before!

text_block_list.name: Candy Store Owner
text_block_list.text: Oh my. Do y'all know Natie?

text_block_list.name: Long-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Yes! We ran together in today's marathon! Nature was so amazing!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hey, now... If you keep that up...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
My face is gonna burn up just as I was starting to
cool down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite all her fussing, Nice Nature ends up with
some sweet treats and even sweeter friends.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I get it. But that sounds a little like a line out
of a sports movie or something.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But sure! I'm in! That's exactly what I need right
now!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Huff... That was harder than the marathon.
choice_data_list: I didn't think you'd be running till sunset.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... Well, me neither. Surprised even myself
there.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But all that running sure set things straight up
there in the old noggin.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's nothing. A little something just occurred
to me is all.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I just figured... I'm actually pretty good at
running, you know?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a clear head, it looks like she's gained a
little confidence.
